[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011000 2
1 1100111 5
2 0100110 3
3 1111110 6
4 1111101 6
5 0101001 3
6 0000100 1
7 1111101 6

01 10 0100110 3 match 2
12 21 1111100 5
23 32 0101001 3 match 5
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0000100 1 match 6
56 65 0111000 3
67 76 0100000 1
70 07 0100110 3 match 2

02 20 0100100 2
13 31 0101000 2
24 42 0000100 1 match 6
35 53 0101001 3 match 5
46 64 0000000 a
57 75 1100101 4

71 17 1100110 4
